babyLearning.en: fully grown and ready to meet you
babyLearning.hi: poori tarah bada ho gaya hai aur aapse milne ke liye taiyaar

title.hi: Intezaar Lagbhag Khatam Ho Gaya Hai

insight.en: After all these months of waiting, the day you have dreamed of is almost here. Soon, you will finally hold your little one.
insight.hi: in saare mahinon ke intezaar ke baad, woh din jiska aapne sapna dekha tha lagbhag aa gaya hai. Jald hi, aap aakhirkaar apne nanhe ko thaamengi.

expanded.en: You have carried this little one through every season of these forty weeks — the wonder, the worry, the quiet nights and the small kicks. And now you stand at the very edge of the wait, with the welcome so close you can almost feel it. There is nothing left to prove and nothing left to perfect. Your baby is ready, and so, in all the ways that truly matter, are you. Let yourself feel the gentle thrill of these last days. The longest, most loving wait of your life is nearly over, and a whole new beginning is just about to start.
expanded.hi: aapne is nanhe ko in chaalees hafton ke har mausam mein dhoya hai — hairaani, chinta, shaant raatein aur chhoti kickein. Aur ab aap intezaar ke bilkul kinaare par khadi hain, swagat itna kareeb ki aap use lagbhag mehsoos kar sakti hain. Ab kuch saabit karna baaki nahi aur kuch perfect karna baaki nahi. Aapka baby taiyaar hai, aur har us tareeke se jo sach mein maayne rakhta hai, aap bhi. Khud ko in aakhri dinon ki naram sihran mehsoos karne dein. Aapki zindagi ka sabse lamba, sabse pyaar bhara intezaar lagbhag khatam ho gaya hai, aur ek bilkul nayi shuruaat shuru hone hi wali hai.

deepDive.en: In the final weeks, babies are considered fully developed and simply gaining strength for the world outside. Doctors call this 'term' — your little one is ready whenever the moment comes.
deepDive.hi: aakhri hafton mein, babies ko poori tarah vikasit maana jaata hai aur woh bas bahari duniya ke liye taakat jutaa rahe hote hain. Doctors ise 'term' kehte hain — aapka nanha jab bhi pal aaye, taiyaar hai.

remember.en: The longest wait of your life is almost over.
remember.hi: aapki zindagi ka sabse lamba intezaar lagbhag khatam ho gaya hai.

title.hi: Bahut Intezaar Kiya Gaya Mehmaan

summary.en: A family prepares with joy for a guest they have waited a long time to welcome.
summary.hi: ek parivar khushi se ek aise mehmaan ke liye taiyaari karta hai jiska swagat karne ka unhe bahut intezaar tha.

body.en:
In a small house at the edge of a village, a family had been waiting a long time for a very special guest. They did not know the exact day the guest would arrive, only that the time was near. So each morning they made their home a little warmer and a little brighter.

The grandmother swept the doorway and laid soft cushions. The father hung a lamp by the gate so the path would be lit. The mother folded a tiny blanket and set it where it could be reached in an instant. They did not mind the waiting, for every small task was an act of love.

Then one quiet dawn, a soft cry rose through the house, and the long-awaited guest had finally come. The whole family gathered close, hearts full. 'We have been ready for you,' they whispered, 'and we would have waited forever.' And the little one was welcomed into a home made entirely of love.
body.hi:
ek gaon ke kinare ek chhote ghar mein, ek parivar bahut samay se ek bahut khaas mehmaan ka intezaar kar raha tha. Unhe theek din nahi pata tha ki mehmaan kab aayega, bas itna ki samay kareeb tha. To har subah woh apne ghar ko thoda aur garm aur thoda aur roshan banaate.

daadi ne darwaaza jhaada aur naram gaddiyaan rakhi. Pita ne gate ke paas ek deepak tanga taaki raasta roshan rahe. Maa ne ek nanha kambal moda aur use wahan rakha jahaan ek pal mein pohancha ja sake. Unhe intezaar bura nahi laga, kyunki har chhota kaam pyaar ka ek kaam tha.

phir ek shaant subah, ghar mein ek naram pukaar uthi, aur jiska bahut intezaar tha woh mehmaan aakhir aa gaya. Poora parivar paas judd gaya, dil bhare hue. 'Hum tumhare liye taiyaar the,' unhone dheere se kaha, 'aur hum hamesha intezaar karte.' Aur nanhe ka swagat ek aise ghar mein hua jo poori tarah pyaar se bana tha.

title.en: Tell your baby the very first thing you will whisper to them when you finally hold them.
title.hi: apne baby ko woh sabse pehli baat bataayein jo aap unhe thaamte hi unke kaan mein kahengi.

motivation.en: The first words your baby hears in your arms will carry all your love at once.
motivation.hi: aapki god mein aapka baby jo pehle shabd sunega woh aapka saara pyaar ek saath leke aayega.

title.hi: Hello Ke Kinaare Par

description.en: A short meditation for the last days of waiting
description.hi: intezaar ke aakhri dinon ke liye ek chhota dhyan

affirmation.en: These are our last quiet days as one. Soon I will hold you in my arms.
affirmation.hi: yeh hamare ek hone ke aakhri shaant din hain. Jald hi main tumhe apni baahon mein thaamungi.

introduction.en: Sit or lie back comfortably and let your eyes close. Take three slow breaths and rest both hands on your belly. Feel how close your baby is now, and imagine the gentle moment when you will finally meet, face to face.
introduction.hi: aaram se baithein ya letein aur aankhein band hone dein. Teen dheemi saansein lein aur dono haath pet par rakhein. Mehsoos karein ki aapka baby ab kitna kareeb hai, aur us naram pal ki kalpana karein jab aap aakhirkaar aamne-saamne milengi.

closingThought.en: You and your baby just shared one of your last quiet moments together. The next will be face to face.
closingThought.hi: aapne aur aapke baby ne abhi saath ke apne aakhri shaant palon mein se ek baanta. Agla aamne-saamne hoga.

about.en: Garbh Sanskar meditations are short, gentle practices to connect with your baby — not generic mindfulness, but a few minutes of sending warmth and love inward. Your calm becomes your baby's calm.
about.hi: Garbh Sanskar meditations chhote, pyaare abhyaas hain apne baby se judne ke liye — koi aam mindfulness nahi, balki kuch minute garmjoshi aur pyaar andar bhejne ke. Aapki shaanti aapke baby ki shaanti ban jaati hai.

howToUse.en: Find a quiet spot, sit comfortably and close your eyes. Follow the introduction, breathe slowly, and rest your attention gently on your baby. Two to three minutes is plenty. Doing it daily, ideally at the same hour, deepens the bond.
howToUse.hi: Ek shaant jagah chunein, aaram se baithein aur aankhein band karein. Introduction follow karein, dheere se saans lein, aur apna dhyan pyaar se apne baby par tikaayein. Do se teen minute kaafi hai. Ise rozana, ho sake to ek hi samay karne se bond gehra hota hai.

title.hi: Mulaaqaat Ki Taraf Saans Lena

content.en: Breathe in slowly and think 'almost here.' Breathe out softly and think 'I am ready.' Repeat gently for one quiet minute.
content.hi: dheere se saans lein aur sochein 'lagbhag aa gaya.' Naram saans chhodein aur sochein 'main taiyaar hoon.' Ek shaant minute tak pyaar se dohraayein.

remember.en: Each calm breath brings the meeting a little closer.
remember.hi: har shaant saans mulaaqaat ko thoda aur kareeb le aati hai.

babyLearning.en: snug and complete, just waiting now
babyLearning.hi: aaram se aur poora, bas ab intezaar mein

title.hi: Tum Har Pal Ke Layak The

insight.en: Every long day, every ache, every hope of these months was leading to one little face. And it was all worth it.
insight.hi: in mahinon ka har lamba din, har dard, har ummeed ek nanhe chehre ki taraf le ja rahi thi. Aur yeh sab us layak tha.

expanded.en: There were days that felt endless, nights of broken sleep, and moments you wondered how you would carry on. Looking back now, you can see that all of it — the tiredness, the patience, the waiting — was quietly building toward this. Soon you will look into your baby's eyes and feel something settle in your heart: that you would do every single day of it again, gladly. Some things in life are worth any amount of waiting, and your little one is the truest of them all. You have not just endured these months; you have loved your way through them.
expanded.hi: aise din the jo anant lagte the, tooti neend ki raatein, aur aise pal jab aap sochti theen ki aap kaise aage badhengi. Ab peeche mudkar dekhein, to aap dekh sakti hain ki yeh sab — thakaan, sabra, intezaar — chupchaap isi ki taraf bana raha tha. Jald hi aap apne baby ki aankhon mein dekhengi aur apne dil mein kuch tham jaata mehsoos karengi: ki aap iska har ek din phir se khushi se jeengi. Zindagi mein kuch cheezein kisi bhi intezaar ke layak hoti hain, aur aapka nanha un sab mein sabse sacha hai. Aapne in mahinon ko sirf saha nahi hai; aap inke beech se pyaar karte hue guzri hain.

deepDive.en: Many parents describe a wave of deep relief and joy the moment they first meet their baby, as months of effort give way to connection. Researchers call this powerful surge of bonding feeling entirely natural.
deepDive.hi: bahut se parents bataate hain ki apne baby se pehli baar milte hi unhe gehri raahat aur khushi ki ek lehar mehsoos hoti hai, jab mahinon ki mehnat judaav mein badal jaati hai. Researchers bonding ki is shaktishaali ehsaas ko bilkul swaabhaavik kehte hain.

remember.en: Every moment of the wait was worth this little one.
remember.hi: intezaar ka har pal is nanhe ke layak tha.

title.hi: Jab Hiran Ka Bachcha Paida Hua

summary.en: A gentle deer waits through the seasons and finds her patience richly rewarded.
summary.hi: ek naram hirni mausamon ke beech intezaar karti hai aur apne sabra ka mithha phal paati hai.

body.en:
In a quiet green forest, a gentle deer waited through many long seasons for her little one to come. Through the cold of winter she stayed warm beneath the trees, and through the heat she rested by the cool stream, always patient, always hopeful.

The other animals sometimes asked, 'Are you not tired of waiting?' The deer only smiled. 'Some things are worth waiting for,' she said softly, 'and the wait is part of the love.'

Then one bright morning, when the forest was washed in golden light, her little fawn was born — bright-eyed, wobbling on tiny legs, leaning close against her side. The deer looked at the fawn and felt every long day fall away like mist in the sun. 'You were worth every season,' she whispered, nuzzling the soft little head. And the whole forest seemed to glow a little brighter, as if it, too, had been waiting just for this.
body.hi:
ek shaant hare jangal mein, ek naram hirni kai lambe mausamon ke beech apne nanhe ke aane ka intezaar karti rahi. Sardiyon ki thand mein woh pedon ke neeche garm rahi, aur garmi mein thande naale ke paas aaram karti, hamesha sabra mein, hamesha ummeed mein.

doosre jaanwar kabhi-kabhi poochte, 'Kya tum intezaar se thak nahi gayi?' Hirni bas muskuraati. 'Kuch cheezein intezaar ke layak hoti hain,' woh dheere se kehti, 'aur intezaar pyaar ka hissa hai.'

phir ek roshan subah, jab jangal sunhri roshni mein nahaaya hua tha, uska nanha hiran paida hua — chamakti aankhon waala, nanhi taangon par ladkhadaata, uske pehlu se sata hua. Hirni ne hiran ko dekha aur har lamba din dhoop mein kuhaase ki tarah pighalta mehsoos kiya. 'Tum har mausam ke layak the,' usne us naram nanhe sir ko sehlaate hue dheere se kaha. Aur poora jangal thoda aur roshan chamakta laga, jaise woh bhi bas isi ka intezaar kar raha ho.

title.en: Tell your baby how long, and how patiently, you have waited just for them.
title.hi: apne baby ko bataayein ki aapne sirf unke liye kitne lambe samay tak, aur kitne sabra se, intezaar kiya hai.

motivation.en: Your baby will love knowing they were wished for, long before they arrived.
motivation.hi: aapke baby ko yeh jaankar pyaar aayega ki unke aane se bahut pehle hi unhe chaaha gaya tha.

title.hi: Raag Basant Mukhari

description.en: Morning raga for a hopeful, joyful dawn
description.hi: subah ka raag, ek ummeed bhari, khushdil bhor ke liye

affirmation.en: As this morning melody rises, so does my joy, blooming gently for you.
affirmation.hi: jaise yeh subah ki dhun uthti hai, waise hi meri khushi bhi, tumhare liye pyaar se khilti hui.

about.en: Ragas are classical Indian melodies, each tied to a mood and time of day. From about week 18 your baby can hear; even now, the calm a raga brings you surrounds your baby and gently shapes a peaceful environment around your pregnancy.
about.hi: Raag classical Bharatiya dhunein hain, har ek kisi mood aur din ke samay se judi. Lagbhag 18ve hafte se aapka baby sun sakta hai; abhi bhi, raag se aane wali shaanti aapke baby ko gher leti hai aur aapki pregnancy ke around ek shaant mahaul banati hai.

howToUse.en: Play the raga softly while you sit or rest with a hand on your belly. You needn't focus hard — let the sound fill the room as you breathe slowly. Two to five minutes, ideally at the raga's time of day, makes it a ritual your baby will one day recognise.
howToUse.hi: Raag dheere se chalaayein jab aap baithein ya pet par haath rakh kar aaram karein. Zyada dhyan lagane ki zaroorat nahi — aawaz ko kamre mein bhar jaane dein jab aap dheere saans lein. Do se paanch minute, ho sake to raag ke samay par, ise ek aisa ritual bana deta hai jise aapka baby ek din pehchaanega.

title.hi: Yeh Sab Iske Layak Tha

content.en: Every hard day and every long night of these months has carried me to this. I would do it all again for you.
content.hi: in mahinon ka har mushkil din aur har lambi raat mujhe yahan tak laayi hai. Main tumhare liye yeh sab phir se karungi.

remember.en: What you waited for is finally almost here.
remember.hi: jiska aapne intezaar kiya woh aakhirkaar lagbhag aa gaya hai.

babyLearning.en: ready to say hello to the world
babyLearning.hi: duniya ko hello kehne ke liye taiyaar

title.hi: Hello Aa Raha Hai

insight.en: Very soon, the first hello of your whole lives together will finally happen. The moment is almost here.
insight.hi: bahut jald, aapki saath ki poori zindagi ka pehla hello aakhirkaar hoga. Woh pal lagbhag aa gaya hai.

expanded.en: For all these months you have spoken to your baby, hoped for them, imagined their face — but always through the soft wall between you. Soon that wall will melt away, and there will be a real hello: skin to skin, eyes to eyes, your voice no longer muffled but warm and clear in their ear. It is the moment every parent dreams of. You do not need to rehearse it or get it right. When it comes, your heart will know exactly what to do. The most beautiful hello of your life is on its way, and nothing can hold it back now.
expanded.hi: in saare mahinon mein aap apne baby se baat karti rahi hain, unke liye ummeed rakhi, unke chehre ki kalpana ki — par hamesha aap dono ke beech ki naram deewaar ke paar se. Jald hi woh deewaar pighal jaayegi, aur ek sacha hello hoga: skin se skin, aankhon se aankhein, aapki aawaz ab dabi nahi balki unke kaan mein garm aur saaf. Yeh woh pal hai jiska har parent sapna dekhta hai. Aapko ise rehearse karne ya theek karne ki zaroorat nahi. Jab woh aayega, aapka dil bilkul jaanega ki kya karna hai. Aapki zindagi ka sabse sundar hello apne raaste par hai, aur ab use kuch nahi rok sakta.

deepDive.en: Newborns recognise their mother's voice from birth, having heard it for months in the womb. That first real hello is, to your baby, the sound of someone already deeply familiar and loved.
deepDive.hi: navjat shishu janm se hi apni maa ki aawaz pehchaante hain, kyunki unhone use mahinon tak garbh mein suna hai. Woh pehla sacha hello, aapke baby ke liye, kisi aise ki aawaz hai jo pehle se hi gehraai se jaani-pehchaani aur pyaari hai.

remember.en: The most beautiful hello of your life is coming.
remember.hi: aapki zindagi ka sabse sundar hello aa raha hai.

title.hi: Gokul Khushi Manata Hai

summary.en: A whole village fills with joy at the arrival of a long-awaited little one.
summary.hi: ek poora gaon ek bahut intezaar kiye gaye nanhe ke aane par khushi se bhar jaata hai.

body.en:
In the village of Gokul, the people had longed for a child whose coming had been hoped for and dreamed of for many seasons. On the night the little one finally arrived, something in the air seemed to shift, soft and full of wonder.

When the news spread that the baby had come, the whole village awoke with joy. Lamps were lit in every doorway, and their warm glow spilled across the lanes. The cowherds danced, the women sang, and elders blessed the child with happy tears in their eyes. Sweets were shared from house to house, and even the cattle seemed to low more softly that night.

Nothing about the little one's arrival was small. A whole community had been waiting, and now their hearts overflowed. 'Welcome, dear one,' they sang into the night. 'You have brought us such joy.' And Gokul glowed until dawn, lit not only by lamps, but by love.
body.hi:
Gokul gaon mein, logon ne ek aise bachche ki chaah ki thi jiske aane ki ummeed aur sapna kai mausamon se dekha ja raha tha. Jis raat nanha aakhirkaar aaya, hawa mein kuch badalta sa laga, naram aur hairaani se bhara.

jab yeh khabar phaili ki baby aa gaya hai, poora gaon khushi se jaag utha. Har darwaaze par deepak jalaaye gaye, aur unki garm roshni galiyon mein chhalak gayi. Gwaale naache, auratein gaayi, aur buzurgon ne aankhon mein khushi ke aansu liye bachche ko aashirwaad diya. Ghar-ghar mein mithaai baanti gayi, aur us raat to gaayein bhi naram aawaz mein rambhaati lageen.

nanhe ke aane mein kuch bhi chhota nahi tha. Ek poora samaaj intezaar kar raha tha, aur ab unke dil chhalak rahe the. 'Swagat hai, pyaare,' woh raat mein gaate rahe. 'Tumne humein itni khushi di hai.' Aur Gokul bhor tak jagmagaata raha, sirf deepkon se nahi, balki pyaar se.

title.en: Tell your baby about the moment you have dreamed of — finally holding them close.
title.hi: apne baby ko us pal ke baare mein bataayein jiska aapne sapna dekha hai — aakhirkaar unhe paas thaamna.

motivation.en: Sharing the moment you long for makes the welcome already feel real.
motivation.hi: jis pal ki aap chaah rakhti hain use baantna swagat ko abhi se asli bana deta hai.

title.en: I Am Ready To Say Hello
title.hi: Main Hello Kehne Ke Liye Taiyaar Hoon

affirmation.en: My arms are open and my heart is ready. Soon I will say my first true hello to you.
affirmation.hi: meri baahein khuli hain aur mera dil taiyaar hai. Jald hi main tumhe apna pehla sacha hello kahungi.

about.en: Garbh Sanskar affirmations are gentle, spiritually-rooted sentences a mother shares with her baby. The calm and love behind your words begin shaping a peaceful inner world for you both, long before your baby is born.
about.hi: Garbh Sanskar affirmations woh pyaari, aadhyatmik vaakya hain jo ek maa apne baby se kehti hai. Aapke shabdon ke peeche ki shaanti aur pyaar, baby ke janm se bahut pehle hi, aap dono ke liye ek shaant andaruni duniya banane lagte hain.

howToUse.en: Sit quietly, rest a hand on your belly, and read the affirmation slowly — once silently, once aloud. Let yourself believe it for these few moments. A minute is enough, and repeating it at the same time each day makes it a calming ritual.
howToUse.hi: Shaanti se baithein, ek haath pet par rakhein, aur affirmation dheere se padhein — ek baar mann mein, ek baar bolkar. In kuch palon ke liye use sach maan lein. Ek minute kaafi hai, aur ise har din ek hi samay dohraana ise ek shaant ritual bana deta hai.

title.hi: Abhi Ke Liye Aasaan, Poshak Niwaale

content.en: If the wait leaves your appetite uneven, keep small, gentle foods close — a banana, a handful of nuts, warm khichdi. Little nourishing bites are kinder than forcing a full meal right now.
content.hi: agar intezaar mein aapki bhookh ek samaan na rahe, to chhote, naram khaane paas rakhein — ek kela, mutthi bhar nuts, garm khichdi. Abhi poora bhojan zabardasti karne se chhote poshak niwaale zyada dayaalu hain.

remember.en: Small, steady bites keep your strength up for the days ahead.
remember.hi: chhote, sthir niwaale aane wale dinon ke liye aapki taakat banaaye rakhte hain.

babyLearning.en: warm and waiting, loved beyond measure
babyLearning.hi: garm aur intezaar mein, behisaab pyaar kiya gaya

title.hi: Ek Aisa Pyaar Jo Aur Kahin Nahi

insight.en: The love you are about to feel for your baby is unlike anything you have known before. It will surprise you with its depth.
insight.hi: apne baby ke liye aap jo pyaar mehsoos karne wali hain woh kisi aur cheez jaisa nahi jo aapne pehle jaani ho. Yeh apni gehraai se aapko chaunka dega.

expanded.en: There is a kind of love that arrives only with a child — fierce and tender at once, vast and yet centred on one tiny person. You may have wondered if you could love this deeply, and soon you will have your answer. It is a love that asks for nothing and gives everything, that makes the whole world seem to rearrange itself around one small face. Do not worry about whether you will feel it 'enough.' It will come, the way the tide comes, sure and full. This love has been growing quietly in you for months, and it is about to find its home.
expanded.hi: ek aisa pyaar hota hai jo sirf ek bachche ke saath aata hai — ek saath tez aur komal, vishaal aur phir bhi ek nanhe insaan par kendrit. Aapne shayad socha ho ki kya aap itni gehraai se pyaar kar sakti hain, aur jald hi aapko jawaab mil jaayega. Yeh ek aisa pyaar hai jo kuch nahi maangta aur sab kuch deta hai, jo poori duniya ko ek nanhe chehre ke around naye sire se jamta hua lagaata hai. Is baat ki chinta na karein ki aap ise 'kaafi' mehsoos karengi ya nahi. Yeh aayega, jaise samundar ka jwaar aata hai, pakka aur poora. Yeh pyaar mahinon se aap mein chupchaap badh raha hai, aur ab apna ghar paane hi wala hai.

deepDive.en: When a parent holds their newborn, the brain releases a surge of oxytocin — often called the bonding hormone — deepening feelings of love and protection. This profound new attachment is one of nature's most powerful designs.
deepDive.hi: jab ek parent apne navjat ko thaamta hai, dimaag oxytocin ki ek lehar chhodta hai — jise aksar bonding hormone kaha jaata hai — jo pyaar aur raksha ki bhaavnaaon ko gehra karti hai. Yeh gehra naya judaav prakriti ke sabse shaktishaali design mein se ek hai.

remember.en: A love deeper than you've known is on its way.
remember.hi: aapke jaane se gehra ek pyaar apne raaste par hai.

title.hi: Jhund Bachhde Ka Swagat Karta Hai

summary.en: A whole gentle herd gathers to protect and welcome its newest little one.
summary.hi: ek poora naram jhund apne sabse naye nanhe ki raksha aur swagat ke liye judd jaata hai.

body.en:
Long ago, in a wide green valley, there lived a great herd of gentle elephants. They moved together, ate together, and looked after one another with deep and patient care. When word spread that the youngest mother was soon to have her calf, a quiet joy rippled through them all.

On the day the little calf was born, the whole herd gathered close in a warm, protective circle. The eldest elephant rested her trunk softly on the newborn, the mothers trumpeted gently, and the young ones peered with wide, curious eyes. No one stood apart. The calf had not taken a single step, yet it already belonged completely.

'You are one of us now,' the herd seemed to say with every gentle touch. 'You will never walk alone.' And the little calf, wrapped in the love of so many, leaned safely against its mother, welcomed by a whole family at once.
body.hi:
bahut samay pehle, ek chaudi hari ghaati mein, naram haathiyon ka ek bada jhund rehta tha. Woh saath chalte, saath khaate, aur ek doosre ka gehri aur sabra bhari dekhbhaal se khayal rakhte. Jab yeh baat phaili ki sabse choti maa jald hi apna bachhda paane wali hai, ek shaant khushi un sab mein lehra gayi.

jis din nanha bachhda paida hua, poora jhund ek garm, rakshak ghere mein paas judd gaya. Sabse boodhi haathi ne apni sood naram se navjat par tikaayi, maayein dheere se chinghaadi, aur chhote bachche badi, jigyaasu aankhon se jhaankte rahe. Koi alag nahi khada raha. Bachhde ne abhi ek bhi kadam nahi rakha tha, phir bhi woh pehle se poori tarah unka tha.

'Tum ab humme se ek ho,' jhund har naram sparsh se kehta sa laga. 'Tum kabhi akele nahi chaloge.' Aur nanha bachhda, itne saaron ke pyaar mein lipta, surakshit apni maa se sata gaya, ek poore parivar dwara ek saath swagat kiya gaya.

title.en: Tell your baby who is here, waiting with open arms, to welcome them.
title.hi: apne baby ko bataayein ki kaun yahan hai, khuli baahon ke saath, unka swagat karne ke liye.

motivation.en: Your baby is being born into a whole circle of waiting love.
motivation.hi: aapka baby intezaar karte pyaar ke ek poore ghere mein janm le raha hai.

title.hi: Pyaar Se Bhara Ek Dil

description.en: A short meditation to feel your love for your baby
description.hi: apne baby ke liye apna pyaar mehsoos karne ka ek chhota dhyan

affirmation.en: My heart is overflowing with a love made just for you.
affirmation.hi: mera dil ek aise pyaar se chhalak raha hai jo sirf tumhare liye bana hai.

introduction.en: Sit comfortably, close your eyes, and rest both hands on your belly. Take a few slow breaths, and let yourself feel how much you already love this little one. Picture that love as a soft, golden warmth filling your whole chest.
introduction.hi: aaram se baithein, aankhein band karein, aur dono haath pet par rakhein. Kuch dheemi saansein lein, aur khud ko mehsoos karne dein ki aap is nanhe se pehle se kitna pyaar karti hain. Us pyaar ko ek naram, sunhri garmjoshi ki tarah sochein jo aapke poore seene ko bhar deti hai.

closingThought.en: That love you just felt is real, and it is only beginning. Carry its warmth with you.
closingThought.hi: jo pyaar aapne abhi mehsoos kiya woh asli hai, aur yeh bas shuru ho raha hai. Uski garmjoshi apne saath le jaayein.

about.en: Garbh Sanskar meditations are short, gentle practices to connect with your baby — not generic mindfulness, but a few minutes of sending warmth and love inward. Your calm becomes your baby's calm.
about.hi: Garbh Sanskar meditations chhote, pyaare abhyaas hain apne baby se judne ke liye — koi aam mindfulness nahi, balki kuch minute garmjoshi aur pyaar andar bhejne ke. Aapki shaanti aapke baby ki shaanti ban jaati hai.

howToUse.en: Find a quiet spot, sit comfortably and close your eyes. Follow the introduction, breathe slowly, and rest your attention gently on your baby. Two to three minutes is plenty. Doing it daily, ideally at the same hour, deepens the bond.
howToUse.hi: Ek shaant jagah chunein, aaram se baithein aur aankhein band karein. Introduction follow karein, dheere se saans lein, aur apna dhyan pyaar se apne baby par tikaayein. Do se teen minute kaafi hai. Ise rozana, ho sake to ek hi samay karne se bond gehra hota hai.

title.hi: Pyaar Ko Saans Mein Lena

content.en: Breathe in slowly and let your heart feel soft and open. Breathe out and imagine that warmth flowing down to your baby. Repeat gently for a minute or two.
content.hi: dheere se saans lein aur apne dil ko naram aur khula mehsoos hone dein. Saans chhodein aur us garmjoshi ko apne baby tak behta hua sochein. Ek-do minute pyaar se dohraayein.

remember.en: Your open heart is the softest place your baby will land.
remember.hi: aapka khula dil woh sabse naram jagah hai jahaan aapka baby utrega.

babyLearning.en: the newest piece of your family
babyLearning.hi: aapke parivar ka sabse naya hissa

title.hi: Tumne Humein Ek Parivar Banaya

insight.en: With your baby's arrival, something new is born too — a family, shaped forever around this little one.
insight.hi: aapke baby ke aane ke saath, kuch naya bhi janm leta hai — ek parivar, hamesha ke liye is nanhe ke around banaya gaya.

expanded.en: A baby does not just join a family; a baby creates one. The moment your little one arrives, the shape of your whole world quietly changes. Two people become parents, a home becomes a place of beginnings, and ordinary days take on a brand-new meaning. Whatever your family looked like before, it is about to grow a tender new centre. This little one will tie hearts together in ways no one could have planned. You are not only welcoming a baby — you are watching a family be born, with your child at the very heart of it.
expanded.hi: ek baby sirf ek parivar mein shaamil nahi hota; ek baby ek parivar banaata hai. Jis pal aapka nanha aata hai, aapki poori duniya ka aakaar chupchaap badal jaata hai. Do log parents ban jaate hain, ek ghar shuruaaton ki jagah ban jaata hai, aur aam din ek bilkul naye maayne le lete hain. Aapka parivar pehle jaisa bhi dikhta ho, woh ek naram naya kendra paane wala hai. Yeh nanha dilon ko aise tareekon se jodega jaisa koi plan nahi kar sakta tha. Aap sirf ek baby ka swagat nahi kar rahi — aap ek parivar ko janm lete dekh rahi hain, jiske bilkul kendra mein aapka bachcha hai.

deepDive.en: Family researchers note that the arrival of a child reorganises relationships and roles across a whole household. A new baby becomes a shared centre of meaning, drawing the people around it closer together.
deepDive.hi: parivar par shodh karne waale bataate hain ki ek bachche ka aana poore ghar mein rishton aur bhumikaaon ko naye sire se jamta hai. Ek naya baby maayne ka ek saanjha kendra ban jaata hai, jo apne around ke logon ko kareeb le aata hai.

remember.en: Your baby doesn't just join a family — they make one.
remember.hi: aapka baby sirf ek parivar mein shaamil nahi hota — woh ek banaata hai.

title.hi: Birbal Aur Sabse Bada Khazana

summary.en: Clever Birbal shows the emperor that the truest treasure is not made of gold.
summary.hi: chalaak Birbal badshah ko dikhaata hai ki sabse sacha khazana sone ka nahi hota.

body.en:
One day Emperor Akbar asked his court a question. 'What,' he said, 'is the greatest treasure a person can own?' One minister said gold; another said jewels; a third said vast lands and palaces. Akbar turned to Birbal, who had stayed quiet. 'And you, Birbal? What is the greatest treasure?'

Birbal smiled. 'Give me a day, Your Majesty, and I will show you.' The next morning he brought before the court a humble man holding a newborn child. The man's clothes were plain and his hands were empty of gold, yet his face shone with a joy brighter than any jewel.

'This,' said Birbal, 'is the greatest treasure. Gold can be lost and palaces can crumble, but the love of a family and the gift of a child is wealth that only grows.' Akbar nodded slowly. 'You are right, Birbal. No treasure in my vaults could ever match it.'
body.hi:
ek din badshah Akbar ne apne darbaar se ek sawaal poocha. 'Ek insaan ke paas,' usne kaha, 'sabse bada khazana kya ho sakta hai?' Ek mantri ne kaha sona; doosre ne kaha jawaharaat; teesre ne kaha vishaal zameenein aur mahal. Akbar Birbal ki taraf muda, jo chup raha tha. 'Aur tum, Birbal? Sabse bada khazana kya hai?'

Birbal muskuraaya. 'Mujhe ek din dein, jahaanpanah, aur main aapko dikhaaunga.' Agli subah woh darbaar ke saamne ek saadharan aadmi ko laaya jo ek navjat bachche ko thaame tha. Aadmi ke kapde saade the aur uske haath sone se khaali the, phir bhi uska chehra kisi bhi jawaahar se zyada roshan khushi se chamak raha tha.

'Yeh,' Birbal ne kaha, 'sabse bada khazana hai. Sona kho sakta hai aur mahal dhah sakte hain, par ek parivar ka pyaar aur ek bachche ka tohfa woh daulat hai jo sirf badhti hai.' Akbar ne dheere se sir hilaaya. 'Tum sahi ho, Birbal. Mere khazaane ka koi dhan iske barabar nahi ho sakta.'

title.en: Tell your baby the promise you make to them, as they come into your family.
title.hi: apne baby ko woh vaada bataayein jo aap unse karti hain, jab woh aapke parivar mein aate hain.

motivation.en: A promise spoken now becomes a quiet vow your child will grow up inside of.
motivation.hi: abhi kaha gaya ek vaada ek shaant pran ban jaata hai jiske andar aapka bachcha bada hoga.

title.hi: Saath Mein Hum Ek Parivar Hain

description.en: An affirmation of family and belonging
description.hi: parivar aur apnepan ka ek affirmation

affirmation.en: You complete us, little one. The moment you arrive, we become a family made whole.
affirmation.hi: tum humein poora karte ho, nanhe. Jis pal tum aate ho, hum ek poora parivar ban jaate hain.

about.en: Garbh Sanskar affirmations are gentle, spiritually-rooted sentences a mother shares with her baby. The calm and love behind your words begin shaping a peaceful inner world for you both, long before your baby is born.
about.hi: Garbh Sanskar affirmations woh pyaari, aadhyatmik vaakya hain jo ek maa apne baby se kehti hai. Aapke shabdon ke peeche ki shaanti aur pyaar, baby ke janm se bahut pehle hi, aap dono ke liye ek shaant andaruni duniya banane lagte hain.

howToUse.en: Sit quietly, rest a hand on your belly, and read the affirmation slowly — once silently, once aloud. Let yourself believe it for these few moments. A minute is enough, and repeating it at the same time each day makes it a calming ritual.
howToUse.hi: Shaanti se baithein, ek haath pet par rakhein, aur affirmation dheere se padhein — ek baar mann mein, ek baar bolkar. In kuch palon ke liye use sach maan lein. Ek minute kaafi hai, aur ise har din ek hi samay dohraana ise ek shaant ritual bana deta hai.

title.hi: Main Ek Parivar Ban Rahi Hoon

content.en: I am not only welcoming a baby; I am stepping into a whole new family, and I step into it with love.
content.hi: main sirf ek baby ka swagat nahi kar rahi; main ek bilkul naye parivar mein kadam rakh rahi hoon, aur main usme pyaar ke saath kadam rakhti hoon.

remember.en: A family is being born along with your baby.
remember.hi: aapke baby ke saath-saath ek parivar bhi janm le raha hai.

babyLearning.en: loved from the very first breath
babyLearning.hi: pehli saans se hi pyaar kiya gaya

title.en: Welcome To The World, Little One
title.hi: Duniya Mein Swagat Hai, Nanhe

insight.en: Your baby is about to open their eyes on a world that has been waiting just for them, and is already full of love.
insight.hi: aapka baby ek aisi duniya mein apni aankhein kholne wala hai jo sirf unka intezaar kar rahi thi, aur pehle se pyaar se bhari hai.

expanded.en: Soon your little one will take their first breath of the open air and meet the world for the very first time. It can feel tender to imagine — so small, so new, stepping into something so vast. But your baby will not arrive alone or unwanted. They come into warm arms, a soft voice they already know, and a love that was ready long before they were. Whatever the world is, your baby's first experience of it will be you: your warmth, your heartbeat, your welcome. That is the world they will know first, and it is a good and loving one.
expanded.hi: jald hi aapka nanha khule hawa ki apni pehli saans lega aur duniya se bilkul pehli baar milega. Ise sochna naazuk lag sakta hai — itna chhota, itna naya, itni vishaal cheez mein kadam rakhta hua. Par aapka baby akela ya anchaaha nahi aayega. Woh garm baahon mein aata hai, ek naram aawaz jise woh pehle se jaanta hai, aur ek aisa pyaar jo unke aane se bahut pehle se taiyaar tha. Duniya jaisi bhi ho, aapke baby ka uska pehla anubhav aap hongi: aapki garmjoshi, aapki dhadkan, aapka swagat. Wahi woh duniya hai jise woh pehle jaanega, aur woh ek achhi aur pyaar bhari duniya hai.

deepDive.en: A newborn placed skin to skin on a parent's chest calms more quickly, breathes more steadily, and settles into warmth and safety. Your body is, quite literally, your baby's first welcome to the world.
deepDive.hi: ek navjat jise parent ke seene par skin se skin rakha jaaye woh zyada jaldi shaant hota hai, zyada sthir saans leta hai, aur garmjoshi aur surakshtaa mein bas jaata hai. Aapka sharir, sach mein, duniya mein aapke baby ka pehla swagat hai.

remember.en: Your baby's first world is your loving arms.
remember.hi: aapke baby ki pehli duniya aapki pyaar bhari baahein hain.

title.hi: Woh Bachcha Jiski Unhone Kaamna Ki

summary.en: A loving couple's deepest wish is finally granted, filling their home with joy.
summary.hi: ek pyaar karne waale jode ki sabse gehri ichha aakhirkaar poori hoti hai, jo unke ghar ko khushi se bhar deti hai.

body.en:
In a little village by the hills, there lived a kind couple who wished, more than anything, for a child to love. Year after year they hoped and waited, planting a small fruit tree in their courtyard for each new spring, watering them with patience and quiet faith.

The villagers sometimes said the wish might never come true. But the couple kept their hearts open and their door ready, never letting their love grow tired or bitter.

Then one gentle season, their wish was finally granted, and a little one came into their home. The whole village came to see, and the courtyard trees, now grown tall, blossomed all at once as if in celebration. The couple held their child close, hardly believing their joy. 'You are the one we wished for,' they whispered through happy tears. 'Welcome home, little one. We have loved you since long before we ever saw your face.'
body.hi:
pahaadiyon ke paas ek chhote gaon mein, ek dayaalu joda rehta tha jo sab se zyada, ek bachche se pyaar karne ki kaamna karta tha. Saal-dar-saal woh ummeed aur intezaar karte rahe, har nayi basant ke liye apne aangan mein ek chhota phal ka ped lagaate, unhe sabra aur shaant vishwaas se seenchte.

gaon waale kabhi-kabhi kehte ki shayad yeh ichha kabhi poori na ho. Par jode ne apne dil khule aur apna darwaaza taiyaar rakha, kabhi apne pyaar ko thakne ya kadwa hone nahi diya.

phir ek naram mausam, unki ichha aakhirkaar poori hui, aur ek nanha unke ghar mein aaya. Poora gaon dekhne aaya, aur aangan ke ped, ab oonche bade hue, ek saath khil uthe jaise jashn mein. Jode ne apne bachche ko paas thaama, apni khushi par mushkil se yaqeen karte hue. 'Tum wahi ho jiski humne kaamna ki,' unhone khushi ke aansuon ke beech dheere se kaha. 'Ghar mein swagat hai, nanhe. Hum tumhe tumhara chehra dekhne se bahut pehle se pyaar karte aaye hain.'

title.en: Tell your baby how deeply loved they are, from their very first breath.
title.hi: apne baby ko bataayein ki unhe kitni gehraai se pyaar kiya jaata hai, unki sabse pehli saans se hi.

motivation.en: To know you are loved from the first breath is the safest start a child can have.
motivation.hi: pehli saans se hi pyaar kiye jaane ko jaanna ek bachche ki sabse surakshit shuruaat hai.

title.hi: Raag Pilu

description.en: Evening raga for tender, loving welcome
description.hi: shaam ka raag, komal, pyaar bhare swagat ke liye

affirmation.en: As this evening melody softens the air, my whole heart softens in welcome of you.
affirmation.hi: jaise yeh shaam ki dhun hawa ko naram karti hai, mera poora dil tumhare swagat mein naram ho jaata hai.

about.en: Ragas are classical Indian melodies, each tied to a mood and time of day. From about week 18 your baby can hear; even now, the calm a raga brings you surrounds your baby and gently shapes a peaceful environment around your pregnancy.
about.hi: Raag classical Bharatiya dhunein hain, har ek kisi mood aur din ke samay se judi. Lagbhag 18ve hafte se aapka baby sun sakta hai; abhi bhi, raag se aane wali shaanti aapke baby ko gher leti hai aur aapki pregnancy ke around ek shaant mahaul banati hai.

howToUse.en: Play the raga softly while you sit or rest with a hand on your belly. You needn't focus hard — let the sound fill the room as you breathe slowly. Two to five minutes, ideally at the raga's time of day, makes it a ritual your baby will one day recognise.
howToUse.hi: Raag dheere se chalaayein jab aap baithein ya pet par haath rakh kar aaram karein. Zyada dhyan lagane ki zaroorat nahi — aawaz ko kamre mein bhar jaane dein jab aap dheere saans lein. Do se paanch minute, ho sake to raag ke samay par, ise ek aisa ritual bana deta hai jise aapka baby ek din pehchaanega.

title.hi: Khaane Jo Dilaasa Aur Sahaara Dein

content.en: If these waiting days leave you restless or low on energy, lean on warm, comforting foods — soft dal, a bowl of porridge, milk with a little turmeric. Gentle, sustaining meals help your body stay steady and strong.
content.hi: agar intezaar ke yeh din aapko bechain ya kam urja waala chhod dein, to garm, dilaasa dene waale khaano ka sahaara lein — naram dal, ek katori daliya, thodi haldi ke saath doodh. Naram, sahaara dene waale bhojan aapke sharir ko sthir aur mazboot rakhne mein madad karte hain.

remember.en: Comforting food is its own quiet kind of care.
remember.hi: dilaasa dene waala khaana apni ek shaant tarah ki dekhbhaal hai.

babyLearning.en: here at last, the beginning of everything
babyLearning.hi: aakhirkaar yahan, har cheez ki shuruaat

title.hi: Har Cheez Ki Shuruaat

insight.en: This is not the end of your journey together. It is the very beginning of everything — the first day of a whole shared life.
insight.hi: yeh aapke saath ke safar ka ant nahi hai. Yeh har cheez ki bilkul shuruaat hai — ek poori saanjhi zindagi ka pehla din.

expanded.en: Two hundred and eighty days ago, this little one was barely a whisper of a hope. Today, the wait is over and the welcome has come. But this is not where your story closes — it is where it truly opens. Every lullaby, every first step, every birthday, every ordinary morning still lies ahead of you both. The months of waiting were only the doorway; now you walk through it together. Hold your little one close and feel it: this is the beginning of everything. The longest, most loving wait of your life has given way to a love with no end. Welcome, little one. Your whole life together starts now.
expanded.hi: do sau assi din pehle, yeh nanha bas ek ummeed ki halki si sargoshi tha. Aaj, intezaar khatam hai aur swagat aa gaya hai. Par yeh wahan nahi jahaan aapki kahani band hoti hai — yeh wahan hai jahaan woh sach mein khulti hai. Har lori, har pehla kadam, har janmdin, har aam subah abhi bhi aap dono ke aage hai. Intezaar ke mahine sirf darwaaza the; ab aap saath usme se guzarti hain. Apne nanhe ko paas thaamein aur mehsoos karein: yeh har cheez ki shuruaat hai. Aapki zindagi ka sabse lamba, sabse pyaar bhara intezaar ek aise pyaar mein badal gaya hai jiska koi ant nahi. Swagat hai, nanhe. Aapki saath ki poori zindagi ab shuru hoti hai.

deepDive.en: The first hours after birth are often called the 'golden hour' — a tender window where skin-to-skin closeness, a familiar voice and gentle warmth begin a lifelong bond. The journey does not end here; the truest part has only just begun.
deepDive.hi: janm ke baad ke pehle ghante ko aksar 'golden hour' kaha jaata hai — ek naazuk samay jahaan skin-to-skin kareebi, ek jaani-pehchaani aawaz aur naram garmjoshi jeevan bhar ka bond shuru karti hai. Safar yahan khatam nahi hota; sabse sacha hissa to abhi shuru hua hai.

remember.en: This is not the end — it is the beginning of everything.
remember.hi: yeh ant nahi hai — yeh har cheez ki shuruaat hai.

title.hi: Woh Phool Jo Aakhirkaar Khila

summary.en: A patient seed becomes a flower, and learns that blooming is only the start.
summary.hi: ek sabra bhara beej ek phool ban jaata hai, aur seekhta hai ki khilna to bas shuruaat hai.

body.en:
Deep in the warm dark earth, a tiny seed waited. It could not yet see the sky, but it could feel something stirring within — a quiet promise of all it might become. Slowly, gently, through many patient days, it grew. A root reached down, a green shoot pushed up, and at last a small bud appeared, closed tight and full of waiting.

The garden held its breath. And then one golden morning, soft as a sigh, the bud finally opened. Petal by petal, the flower bloomed into the light, more beautiful than the garden had dared to imagine. The sun warmed its face, a gentle breeze welcomed it, and the whole garden seemed to whisper, 'There you are. We have been waiting for you.'

But the flower soon learned something wonderful. Blooming was not the end of its story — it was the very beginning. Now there were mornings to greet, seasons to grow through, and a whole bright life still ahead. The long wait was over, and everything was just about to begin.
body.hi:
garm andheri mitti mein gehre, ek nanha beej intezaar kar raha tha. Woh abhi aasmaan nahi dekh sakta tha, par woh apne andar kuch hilta hua mehsoos kar sakta tha — un sab ka ek shaant vaada jo woh ban sakta tha. Dheere, naram, kai sabra bhare dinon mein, woh bada hua. Ek jad neeche pohanchi, ek hara ankur upar utha, aur aakhir mein ek chhoti kali aayi, kas kar bandh aur intezaar se bhari.

baageecha apni saans roke raha. Aur phir ek sunhri subah, ek aah jaisi naram, kali aakhirkaar khuli. Pankhdi-dar-pankhdi, phool roshni mein khil utha, baageeche ki kalpana se bhi zyada sundar. Suraj ne uske chehre ko garm kiya, ek naram hawa ne uska swagat kiya, aur poora baageecha dheere se kehta sa laga, 'Wahan ho tum. Hum tumhara intezaar kar rahe the.'

par phool ne jald hi kuch adbhut seekha. Khilna uski kahani ka ant nahi tha — yeh to bilkul shuruaat thi. Ab subahein the jinka swagat karna tha, mausam the jinme se badhna tha, aur ek poori roshan zindagi abhi bhi aage thi. Lamba intezaar khatam ho gaya tha, aur sab kuch bas shuru hone hi wala tha.

title.en: Tell your baby the words your heart has waited all these months to say: welcome to the world, my little one.
title.hi: apne baby ko woh shabd bataayein jinhe kehne ke liye aapka dil in saare mahinon se intezaar kar raha tha: duniya mein swagat hai, mere nanhe.

motivation.en: These are the first true words of your forever together — let them carry every bit of your love.
motivation.hi: yeh aapke hamesha ke saath ke pehle sache shabd hain — inhe apne pyaar ka har kan leke jaane dein.

title.hi: Hamesha Ka Pehla Din

description.en: A short meditation to welcome the beginning
description.hi: shuruaat ka swagat karne ka ek chhota dhyan

affirmation.en: The wait is over and our forever begins. Welcome, my little one, into a life full of love.
affirmation.hi: intezaar khatam hai aur hamara hamesha shuru hota hai. Swagat hai, mere nanhe, pyaar se bhari ek zindagi mein.

introduction.en: Sit or lie back comfortably, close your eyes, and rest both hands on your belly. Take three slow, grateful breaths. Let yourself feel the wonder of this whole journey, and gently imagine the first moment you hold your baby — the beginning of everything you will share.
introduction.hi: aaram se baithein ya letein, aankhein band karein, aur dono haath pet par rakhein. Teen dheemi, kritagya saansein lein. Khud ko is poore safar ki hairaani mehsoos karne dein, aur pyaar se us pehle pal ki kalpana karein jab aap apne baby ko thaamengi — har us cheez ki shuruaat jo aap baantengi.

closingThought.en: This journey of forty weeks ends here, but your life together is only beginning. Carry this love into every day ahead.
closingThought.hi: chaalees hafton ka yeh safar yahan khatam hota hai, par aapki saath ki zindagi bas shuru ho rahi hai. Is pyaar ko aage ke har din mein leke jaayein.

about.en: Garbh Sanskar meditations are short, gentle practices to connect with your baby — not generic mindfulness, but a few minutes of sending warmth and love inward. Your calm becomes your baby's calm.
about.hi: Garbh Sanskar meditations chhote, pyaare abhyaas hain apne baby se judne ke liye — koi aam mindfulness nahi, balki kuch minute garmjoshi aur pyaar andar bhejne ke. Aapki shaanti aapke baby ki shaanti ban jaati hai.

howToUse.en: Find a quiet spot, sit comfortably and close your eyes. Follow the introduction, breathe slowly, and rest your attention gently on your baby. Two to three minutes is plenty. Doing it daily, ideally at the same hour, deepens the bond.
howToUse.hi: Ek shaant jagah chunein, aaram se baithein aur aankhein band karein. Introduction follow karein, dheere se saans lein, aur apna dhyan pyaar se apne baby par tikaayein. Do se teen minute kaafi hai. Ise rozana, ho sake to ek hi samay karne se bond gehra hota hai.

title.hi: Ek Aakhri Kritagya Saans

content.en: Breathe in slowly and feel gratitude for the whole journey behind you. Breathe out and welcome everything still to come. Rest in this one quiet, grateful breath.
content.hi: dheere se saans lein aur apne peeche ke poore safar ke liye kritagyata mehsoos karein. Saans chhodein aur aane wali har cheez ka swagat karein. Is ek shaant, kritagya saans mein tikein.

remember.en: Breathe in gratitude, breathe out into a whole new beginning.
remember.hi: kritagyata andar lein, ek bilkul nayi shuruaat mein saans chhodein.
